meta.title: Post-Traumatic Growth Survey
meta.subtitle: Confidential Research Survey · All responses are anonymous and protected

bubbles.text: Welcome! We're so glad you're here.
Thank you for taking the time to share your story with us.
Everything you share is completely anonymous and protected.

intro.text: Let's start with a few details about you. Everything you share is completely anonymous and used only for research purposes.

questions.label: When were you born?
questions.hint: Your age helps us understand the context of your experience.

questions.label: How do you identify your gender?
What is your PIN code?
questions.hint: Optional — helps us understand the geographic reach of our research.

intro.text: This chapter touches on experiences that may feel personal. Please take your time — there are no right or wrong answers, and you can skip anything you're not comfortable sharing.

questions.label: Have you experienced a traumatic event?
What type of trauma have you experienced?
questions.hint: Select the one that best describes your primary experience.

options.label: Yes — I am currently receiving support
Yes — I have received support in the past
No — but I am interested in finding support

questions.label: How would you describe your current level of distress?
questions.hint: 1 = no distress at all · 10 = extreme distress

intro.text: This is your space. Share as much or as little as you feel comfortable with. Your words contribute to research that will help others find their own path forward.

questions.label: Tell us your story
questions.hint: You might describe your experience, what you've learned, how you've grown, or what you'd want others to know. Tap the 🎤 microphone to speak instead of type.

intro.text: Thank you — you've shared something meaningful. Just one final step before we can receive your responses.

questions.label: I consent to my responses being used anonymously for research purposes.
questions.description: Your responses will be kept strictly confidential and used only for academic research on post-traumatic growth. No personally identifiable information will ever be shared or published.

completion.title: Thank you, from the bottom of our hearts.
completion.message: Your story is now part of something larger. This research will help us better understand how people find strength, meaning, and growth after adversity — and ultimately help others on their own journey.
completion.sub: Every voice matters. Yours does too.
